newsSince: Decisive: on June 15, 2026 shareholders APPROVED the plan of arrangement with a Francisco Partners affiliate (Apollo Purchaser) — C$9.00 cash per share plus one CVR worth up to C$0.50 tied to an FY2027 ARR target. Deal proceeds to closing; the stock delists on completion. The arbitrage spread is now essentially fully realized.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-alpha lens: the June 15 shareholder approval removes the last conditionality — at C$9.03 vs C$9.00 cash + ~C$0.50 CVR stub, the name is terminally capped and delists on close. No latent AI-supply-chain optionality can be expressed once private; decisive down on this evidence-gated page.
verdicts.bull: Deal-certain: C$9.00 cash plus a CVR worth up to C$0.50 on an FY27 ARR hurdle offers a small risk-light stub.
verdicts.neutral: Pure merger-arb now; upside is fixed at the cash price with only the CVR optionality.
verdicts.bear: Latent AI-node thesis is moot — shareholders approved the take-private and the stock delists on close.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Deal close and the CVR FY2027 ARR payout.
verdicts.primaryRisk: CVR expires worthless if the FY2027 ARR target is missed.
